race.comment: JESSICA RABBIT (9) resumes and looks well placed here into her second campaign. She was runner up in a strong maiden at Ballarat on debut behind Chergui, thought highly enough to tackle a G3 off that next time out. She's been jumping out well leading in and should go close here. WYANDRA (8) is knocking on the door having just found one better at his past couple, giving a sight here last time out when beaten a long neck. He draws for every hope and can break through. MACCA'S ANGEL (11) ran on strongly from back in a small field first up here to be beaten under a length. Better for that and up to 1200m should suit nicely. KINGSBURY (7) is an Extreme Choice gelding who debuts for the Clinton McDonald yard, respect any support.
